name: Strike Galaxy Attack
description: Prepare for an adrenaline-fueled, top-down, military space shooting extravaganza with Strike Galaxy Attack! Show off your lightning-fast reflexes and strategic thinking as you face off against a relentless army of invaders. Memorize their patterns, unleash your firepower, and become the hero who saves the galaxy. Suitable for players of all ages, this free online game guarantees endless fun. Engage now and embark on an intergalactic adventure!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Action, Adventure, free html5 games for your website, html5 games, Shooting
